title: Today's Markets Brief: Mynd.ai stock surges after regaining NYSE compliance
summary: Mynd.ai stock jumps after regaining NYSE compliance, S&P 500 stocks performance in May, and more

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to your markets brief. I am looking at some fresh signals that caught my eye, and I'm excited to walk you through them. Let's dive right in. It's been a bit of an interesting week, and I'm glad to be breaking it down for you.

First up, Mynd.ai stock surged after regaining NYSE compliance. For those who might not know, when a company's stock falls below certain price or market cap thresholds, exchanges like the NYSE can take action, including delisting. So, regaining compliance is a big deal. It seems investors are pretty optimistic about the company's prospects, which is great for them. I'm curious to see how they'll continue to perform.

Next, I came across a piece on Yahoo Finance about the best and worst S&P 500 stocks in May. What stands out to me is that server makers like Dell had a notable performance. It's interesting to see how different sectors are doing, especially with all the chatter about tech and AI. I mean, who isn't talking about AI these days, right?

My quick read: today's market story has that familiar split-screen feeling. There is real excitement around artificial intelligence and chips, but the room still keeps one eye on risk, because markets enjoy a celebration more when they know where the exits are.
